name: ideal-real-porpoise
description: A next project generated based on a UIDL document

scripts.predev: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$processIds = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($processIds) { $processIds | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; try { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force '.next' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } catch { }"

author: TeleportHQ
